title: Red Bull Basement Finals
event: Red Bull Basement UAE National Finals
services: Project Management | Scenic & Production Design | Custom Build & Execution | Entrance Arch & Media Wall Build | Stage, Demo Gallery & Podcast Area Setup | Audio, Lighting & Video Production | Power, Scaffolding & Technical Site Execution
concept: The Red Bull Basement UAE National Finals were designed as a bold innovation-focused event environment, bringing together entrepreneurs, creators, judges, and guests in a high-energy showcase setting. The experience translated the Red Bull Basement platform into a physical space built around pitching, content, networking, and live audience engagement.
story:
For the Red Bull Basement UAE National Finals, Take Me Live delivered a complete event environment covering project management, scenic build, production infrastructure, technical systems, and guest-facing experience zones. The scope included a branded entrance arch, media wall, main stage, judges platform, demo gallery, and Moniify podcast area, creating a layered environment for presentations, interviews, showcases, and audience interaction.

The production scope also included audio, lighting, video, LED screen, power distribution, scaffolding, furniture setup, site protection, manpower, and permit coordination. With dedicated production and technical management across setup and dismantle, the finals were executed as a polished, brand-aligned platform for spotlighting the next generation of innovators.
summary: The Red Bull Basement UAE National Finals were designed as a bold innovation-focused event environment, bringing together entrepreneurs, creators, judges, and guests in a high-energy showcase setting. The experience translated the Red Bull Basement platform into a physical space built around pitching, content, networking, and live audience engagement.

title: 1 Billion Summit
tagline: Red Bull Energy Lounge at 1 Billion Summit
services: Networking Lounge & Exhibition Stand Design | Scenic & Production Design | Art Direction | Technical Design | Custom Build & Execution | Interactive Experience Integration
concept: The Red Bull Energy Lounge was conceived as a multi-zone experiential stand designed to energize networking and content creation within the fast-paced environment of the 1 Billion Summit. The concept translated Red Bull's high-performance DNA into a bold architectural space that balanced intensity, movement, and social interaction.
story: For the 1 Billion Summit, Take Me Live delivered the Red Bull Energy Lounge as an immersive exhibition and networking destination featuring layered experiences across the stand. A central hospitality zone anchored by the Red Bull bar set the tone, supported by a DJ area that drove energy and atmosphere throughout the day. Interactive F1 simulator zones brought a playful, competitive element, while a dedicated streaming room enabled live content capture directly from the activation. A standout podcast area hosted Ahmad Jaber (AJ) of Jibber with Jaber, providing a live broadcast platform where conversations and interviews unfolded over the three-day summit, adding cultural and influencer relevance. A basement-inspired zone added depth and contrast, creating intimate pockets within the larger layout. Thoughtful spatial planning ensured smooth guest flow between high-energy and relaxed spaces, allowing visitors to engage with the Red Bull brand in multiple meaningful ways that complemented the dynamic environment of the summit.
summary: The Red Bull Energy Lounge was conceived as a multi-zone experiential stand designed to energize networking and content creation within the fast-paced environment of the 1 Billion Summit. The concept translated Red Bull's high-performance DNA into a bold architectural space that balanced intensity, movement, and social interaction.

title: TOKEN 2049
services: Networking Lounge & Exhibition Stand Design | Scenic & Production Design | Art Direction | Technical Design | Content Creation | Execution
concept: Cyberpunk-inspired exhibition stands and networking lounges for ioNet, showcasing their cutting-edge GPU technology and cryptocurrency launch. The minimalist design relied entirely on dynamic LED visuals to create a futuristic, high-tech ambiance, powered by BC8.ai, an ioNet-backed technology platform.
story: Take Me Live partnered with Phoenix, a U.S. agency, to create cyberpunk-themed exhibition stands and networking lounges for ioNet at both Token 2049 in Dubai (April) and Super AI in Singapore (June). Powered by ioNet's BC8.ai platform, the designs featured towering LED monoliths displaying custom cyberpunk visuals: neon cityscapes, futuristic interfaces, and real-time data. These screens provided all the lighting, casting a vibrant glow across each space. Live countdowns and interactive elements further engaged attendees. The bold aesthetic and immersive visuals reinforced ioNet's brand and technological leadership, making the spaces highlights of both events.

title: Dubai Media Annual Gala
services: Stage & LED Screen Installation | Scenic & Production Design | Art Direction, Technical Design | Content Creation | Execution
concept: The event was designed to be an engaging and immersive experience, blending technology, entertainment, and creativity to celebrate Dubai Media's corporate culture. A sleek LED stage served as the focal point, complemented by interactive installations such as an AI-powered photobooth, mosaic photobooth, and LED flooring. Live entertainment and a curated art gallery added depth, ensuring a dynamic and memorable atmosphere.
story: With just four days to execute, Take Me Live transformed Dubai Media's event into a seamless, high-energy production. Guests were welcomed by LED screens displaying their names via QR code scanning, setting an interactive tone from the start. Inside, a bold LED stage anchored the space, while digital activations and live entertainment—including an iPad magician, violinist, Arabic calligraphers, and a caricaturist—kept guests engaged. A live raffle draw with custom animations built anticipation, while a dedicated art gallery celebrated employee creativity, reinforcing Dubai Media's commitment to talent and innovation. The presence of Sheikh Hasher bin Maktoum bin Juma Al Maktoum added prestige, with a VIP concierge ensuring a seamless experience. Despite the tight timeline, Take Me Live delivered a visually striking and engaging event, creating a lasting impact on attendees and solidifying Dubai Media's reputation for innovation and creativity.
summary: The event was designed to be an engaging and immersive experience, blending technology, entertainment, and creativity to celebrate Dubai Media's corporate culture. A sleek LED stage served as the focal point, complemented by interactive installations such as an AI-powered photobooth, mosaic photobooth, and LED flooring. Live entertainment and a curated art gallery added depth, ensuring a dynamic and memorable atmosphere.

title: Maraya Concert Series
concept: Set against the breathtaking backdrop of AlUla, the world's largest mirrored structure, Maraya became the stage for the Maraya Concert Series, an unprecedented cultural showcase. Live Nation Middle East and PHNTM partnered with Take Me Live to produce a concert experience that celebrated the venue's heritage while pushing the boundaries of immersive production. The creative direction focused on elegant minimalism fused with meaningful storytelling, ensuring each performance reflected the artist's identity and the spirit of AlUla.
story: Take Me Live brought 28 unforgettable shows to life, featuring global stars like Andrea Bocelli, Mariah Carey, Westlife, John Legend, and Usher, alongside Arabic icons such as Mohammed Abdo, Kadim Al Sahir, Magida El Roumi, Assala Nasri, Angham, and Guy Manoukian. Each concert was uniquely tailored, with custom lighting, content, and stage design developed to reflect each artist's essence while respecting Maraya's architectural integrity. Our team produced immersive 90-minute visual journeys, blending modern artistry with cultural nuance. With 2.8 million global viewers and 400 guests per evening, the Maraya Concert Series became a cultural milestone. It underscored Take Me Live's ability to deliver high-impact, sensitive productions in one of the world's most symbolic venues.

title: Blackpink ME Tour
location: Riyadh, Saudi Arabia & Abu Dhabi, UAE
concept: In the heart of the Middle East, PHNTM and Live Nation partnered with Take Me Live to bring Blackpink's electrifying energy to the stage across Abu Dhabi and Riyadh. The mission was to fuse cutting-edge technology with artistic precision, transforming each venue into an immersive visual and sonic spectacle. Dynamic LED displays, intricate lighting, and explosive effects created a high-impact experience worthy of the global superstars.
story:
Commissioned by Live Nation Middle East, PHNTM and Take Me Live collaborated to deliver the full technical production for Blackpink's Middle Eastern tour. Working from an extensive rider, Take Me Live led local vendor management, ensuring flawless execution in both cities.

Staged on the Star Live Titan—the world's largest outdoor structure—the shows featured six automated LED screens, 500 lighting fixtures, 40 lasers, and 100 special effects units including flames, CO2, and pyrotechnics.

We also supported an 18-camera iMAG system that streamed live footage to massive side LED screens, amplifying the experience for over 70,000 fans.

The tour concluded with a synchronized pyrotechnic finale designed alongside the touring team. This seamless blend of technology and creativity reinforced PHNTM, Live Nation, and Take Me Live's reputation for delivering large-scale, world-class productions.
summary: In the heart of the Middle East, PHNTM and Live Nation partnered with Take Me Live to bring Blackpink's electrifying energy to the stage across Abu Dhabi and Riyadh. The mission was to fuse cutting-edge technology with artistic precision, transforming each venue into an immersive visual and sonic spectacle. Dynamic LED displays, intricate lighting, and explosive effects created a high-impact experience worthy of the global superstars.

title: Qatar Live 2021
tagline: Experiential landmark for the Arab Cup
concept: Qatar Live 2021 was conceived as a cultural and creative landmark for the Arab Cup, a spectacular fusion of tradition and technology. With PHNTM leading the creative direction, Take Me Live was brought in as the execution partner to reimagine the Doha Exhibition and Convention Center into an immersive, never-before-seen live event arena. The vision was clear: a seamless integration of architectural innovation, immersive content, and emotionally charged stage design that celebrated the spirit of Doha on a global platform.
story:
When PHNTM needed a production powerhouse capable of delivering their boldest vision yet, they partnered with Take Me Live. Over 20 days, our team transformed 5.5 million square feet into a living, breathing spectacle anchored by "The Flower," a massive projection-mapped sculpture built with 92 petals and 482 rigging points. To bring this monumental installation to life, we engineered a bespoke ground support system to overcome technical challenges posed by the venue's porous roof.

From custom-branded lobbies and tailored photo zones to a fully immersive concert environment for 17,500 guests, every detail was executed with precision and artistry. The event's scale, creativity, and flawless execution set a new benchmark for live events in the region. Qatar Live 2021 became a defining moment in experiential production.
summary: Qatar Live 2021 was conceived as a cultural and creative landmark for the Arab Cup, a spectacular fusion of tradition and technology. With PHNTM leading the creative direction, Take Me Live was brought in as the execution partner to reimagine the Doha Exhibition and Convention Center into an immersive, never-before-seen live event arena. The vision was clear: a seamless integration of architectural innovation, immersive content, and emotionally charged stage design that celebrated the spirit of Doha on a global platform.

title: Lusail Super Cup
client: FIFA & Supreme Committee for Delivery & Legacy
concept:
In the heart of Doha, as Lusail Stadium prepared for its global debut, PHNTM and Live Nation partnered with Take Me Live to stage the Lusail Super Cup, a pre-World Cup moment that signaled what was to come. More than a football match, it was a cultural statement.

The challenge was to blend Arab heritage with next-generation production to craft a visual anthem for football in the region. Drawing from the stadium's lantern-inspired design and Islamic geometry, we transformed Lusail into a vibrant showcase of Middle Eastern pride and global sport.
story:
With 77,575 fans in attendance, 3,500 fireworks, 500 lighting fixtures, and 80,000 synchronized LED wristbands, the Lusail Super Cup delivered an immersive spectacle of culture, sport, and innovation.

Take Me Live engineered key production elements, from a circular stage echoing fanar patterns to a stadium-wide light show. Egyptian icon Amr Diab's headline performance lit up the night in perfect sync with the dynamic visuals.

Every detail, from camera blocking to pyro timing, was precision-calibrated for live and broadcast impact.

The Lusail Super Cup became a defining moment, proving the region's readiness and setting a new production standard ahead of FIFA World Cup 2022.
summary:

title: Cinema Medley
concept: Imperial Orchestra made its grand debut in the Middle East with two spectacular performances at Coca-Cola Arena, Dubai. The first show, Cinema Medley, took place in May, followed by an even more ambitious sequel, Cinema Medley 2, in December. Both productions were designed to deliver an immersive symphonic experience, blending the power of live orchestration with cutting-edge stage and technical execution.
story: Imperial Orchestra made its Dubai debut with Cinema Medley in May, followed by Cinema Medley 2 in December. With high client expectations, every production detail was meticulously executed. The December show featured 120 musicians, an orchestra, choir, and folk instruments, performing legendary soundtracks from films like Oppenheimer, The Mandalorian, Lord of the Rings, Titanic, James Bond, and more. The orchestra made history premiering the Oppenheimer symphonic suite. The visually striking stage setup enhanced the grandeur of the full symphony, while cutting-edge technical production ensured flawless synchronization of sound, lighting, and visuals. Delivered within tight deadlines, the seamless integration of music, visuals, and stagecraft exceeded expectations, reinforcing the orchestra's reputation for unforgettable musical experiences. The emotional and breathtaking performance left a lasting impression, cementing Imperial Orchestra's presence in the Middle East.
summary: Imperial Orchestra made its grand debut in the Middle East with two spectacular performances at Coca-Cola Arena, Dubai.
